value.body:
## Context

Ticket quality varies. Before implementation, agents should have a consistent checklist for scope, dependencies, expected files, verification, and handoff.

## Outcome

Cycle generates an execution checklist for each assigned ticket and records checklist progress during the agent run.

## Acceptance criteria

- Checklist includes dependency readiness, branch/worktree setup, implementation plan, tests to run, documentation impact, follow-up capture, and handoff completion.
- Agents can update checklist items through MCP.
- Missing acceptance criteria or unclear scope can move a ticket to a needs-clarification state instead of starting work blindly.
- UI shows checklist progress on agent task and ticket detail.
- Tests cover checklist generation, updates, and needs-clarification behavior.

frontmatter.title: Generate per-ticket agent runbooks and execution checklists

value.title: Generate per-ticket agent runbooks and execution checklists
